data.content:
implementation,system type	LightRAG
Retrieval-Augmented Generation
LightRAG is implemented as a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system.

construction,knowledge storage	Knowledge Graph
LightRAG
LightRAG supports graph-based knowledge storage and constructs knowledge graphs from text.

feature support,performance	Document Indexing
LightRAG
LightRAG supports fast document indexing as a key feature.

automation,process inclusion	Document Indexing
Entity Extraction
Document indexing includes automatic entity extraction.

functionality,search options	LightRAG
Query Modes
LightRAG supports multiple query modes including naive, local, global, hybrid, and mix.

integration,provider support	LLM
LightRAG
LightRAG supports various LLM providers.

construction,source material	Knowledge Graph
Unstructured Text
Knowledge graphs are constructed from unstructured text.

operation,search target	Indexed Content
Semantic Search
Semantic search is enabled over the indexed content.

integration,provider support	Embedding
LightRAG
LightRAG supports various embedding providers.

configuration,model usage	Document Processing Pipeline
Embedding
The document processing pipeline works with configured embedding models.

feature,quality improvement	LightRAG
Reranking
LightRAG includes built-in reranking for improved retrieval quality.

configuration,model usage	Document Processing Pipeline
LLM
The document processing pipeline works with configured LLM models.

capability,enablement	LightRAG
Semantic Search
LightRAG enables semantic search over indexed content.

testing,verification	Document Processing Pipeline
LightRAG Test Document
The LightRAG Test Document is used to verify that the document processing pipeline works correctly.

functionality,system support	Document Retrieval
LightRAG
LightRAG supports efficient document retrieval.

extraction source,processing	Documents
LightRAG
The system extracts entities and relationships from documents.
